accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text; the Advisory Council composition, meeting requirements, and sunset are correctly described.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or incorrect claims; omits corticobasal degeneration from the definition list but doesn't misstate anything.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose as establishing the National Parkinson's Project under HHS.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the act amends the Public Health Service Act.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes 2035 sunset and key deadlines for the Advisory Council and the annual assessment.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes 24-month and 18-month deadlines and the 2035 sunset.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers establishment of the National Parkinson's Project, Secretary's duties, Advisory Council, and sunset.

concise.why: Appropriately concise while capturing major provisions without excessive granularity.

correct_entities.why: All entities including HHS, Secretary, Advisory Council correctly named.

correct_figures.why: All deadlines and dates correctly stated.
